SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF JUN-18-2026 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF JUN-18-2026 BY VISITING JUDGE CARRIE ZEPEDA. APPEARANCES: PLAINTIFF ROBERT TILGHMAN IS PRESENT. DEFENDANTS DIAMOND HEIGHTS VILLAGE ASSOCIATION AND PROPERTY MANAGEMENT PROFESSIONALS LLC ARE PRESENT. APPEARING FOR THE DEFENDANT IS JON VENNARUCCI. CLERK: M. DE LUNA. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. NOT REPORTED. (D506)
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF JUN-18-2026 - JUDGMENT.

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF TILGHMAN, ROBERT RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT DIAMOND HEIGHTS VILLAGE ASSOCIATION PROPERTY MANAGEMENT PROFESSIONALS LLC $7,500.00 PRINCIPAL, $174.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $7,674.00, DEFENDANTS (JOINTLY AND SEVERALLY LIABLE) SHALL PAY PLAINTIFF $7,674.00 (PLAINTIFF'S DAMAGES WERE ACTUALLY MORE, BUT HE ONLY REQUESTED $7,500.00 IN HIS COMPLAINT.) STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS NO EXHIBITS FILED
